meta_title: For Students: passive income to Solve no project ideas (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to passive income and overcome no project ideas. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Passive Income via AI Apps (Intermediate Guide)
content.seo_description: Stuck with no project ideas? Learn to build passive income AI apps using Antigravity and Claude Code. A high-impact, intermediate checklist for students.
content.answer_block: Overcome project paralysis by shifting focus from 'what to build' to 'what solves a recurring, paid pain point.' By leveraging Antigravity for rapid scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative refinement, you can deploy niche AI micro-SaaS tools that generate passive income while building a world-class engineering portfolio.
content.intro:
The screen is blank. Your cursor blinks with rhythmic indifference, mocking the ambition you felt just an hour ago. You have the technical stack, the curiosity, and the drive, yet you are paralyzed by the 'no project ideas' paradox. It is the silent killer of student innovation—the gap between knowing how to code and knowing what is worth coding.

But here is the secret: the most successful AI builders don't wait for a lightning strike of inspiration. They build systems that solve small, boring, and profitable problems for specific niches. By treating your code as an asset that works while you sleep, you transform from a student into a founder. Today, we bridge that gap.

steps.title: Identify a High-Intent Micro-Niche
steps.description: Stop guessing. Use social listening on platforms like Reddit or niche forums to find recurring 'how do I automate X' questions. Focus on workflows that save users at least 2 hours a week.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a market researcher. Analyze the following problem: [paste user problem]. Identify three micro-SaaS opportunities that solve this with AI, focusing on high-value, low-complexity features.
steps.claude_code_command: claude research --query 'market demand for [problem] automation tools'

steps.title: Scaffold the Architecture with Antigravity
steps.description: Don't waste time on boilerplate. Antigravity handles the infrastructure, authentication, and database connections so you can focus on the business logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a boilerplate for a Next.js application with Supabase auth, Stripe integration for subscriptions, and an OpenAI API route handler. Include a clean folder structure for scalability.

steps.title: Implement the Core AI Value Driver
steps.description: This is where your app becomes useful. Use Claude Code to build a robust prompt-chaining system that delivers consistent, high-quality output for your users.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a service layer in TypeScript that handles asynchronous AI request streaming. Include error handling for API timeouts and token limits.

steps.title: Automate the Monetization Flow
steps.description: If it isn't monetized, it's just a hobby. Integrate Stripe Webhooks to manage subscription status and access control based on user tiers.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a secure Stripe webhook handler to update the database subscription status in Supabase when a payment event is received.

steps.title: Deploy and Iterate with Monitoring
steps.description: Ship early. Use Claude Code to set up automated logging so you can see exactly where users are getting stuck in your funnel.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure an observability wrapper for the API routes to log request latency and success rates to a dashboard.

pro_tips: Build for 'boring' industries like legal documentation or logistics; they have higher budgets and lower competition than consumer apps.
Always add a 'feedback' button in your MVP; user complaints are the most valuable roadmap you will ever have.
Keep your tech stack minimal. If you aren't using a framework that handles deployment, you're building a project, not a product.
Use 'feature flagging' to test new AI models (e.g., GPT-4o vs Claude 3.5 Sonnet) without redeploying your entire application.
Focus on distribution from day one. If you can't describe your product's value in one sentence, your UI is too complex.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is live, spend 30 minutes a day on 'Growth Hacking' by sharing your build-in-public journey on X or LinkedIn to attract your first ten paying users.
content.conversion_block: You now have the framework to stop dreaming and start shipping. Don't let your code sit on a hard drive—get it into the hands of users and start generating value. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
